inputs.label: Document Page Count
inputs.businessContext: Total number of pages in the document.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of pages in the document.

inputs.label: Average References per Page
inputs.businessContext: Typical number of citations per page.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical number of citations per page.
businessContext_i18n.de: Typische Anzahl von Zitaten pro Seite.

inputs.label: Citation Density
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of pages that have citations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of pages that have citations.

inputs.label: Formatting Time per Reference
inputs.businessContext: Time to format one reference according to style.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time to format one reference according to style.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Stile göre bir referansı biçimlendirme süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, eine Referenz gemäß Stil zu formatieren.

inputs.label: Style Complexity Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier for bibliography style complexity (e.g., APA = 1.0, Chicago = 1.2).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier for bibliography style complexity (e.g., APA = 1.0, Chicago = 1.2).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynakça stili karmaşıklığı için çarpan (örn. APA = 1.0, Chicago = 1.2).
businessContext_i18n.de: Multiplikator für die Komplexität des Bibliografiestils (z. B. APA = 1,0, Chicago = 1,2).

inputs.label: Overhead Time
inputs.businessContext: Fixed time for setting up bibliography tools.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed time for setting up bibliography tools.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaynakça araçlarını kurmak için sabit süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Feste Zeit für die Einrichtung von Bibliografiewerkzeugen.

inputs.label: External References Count
inputs.businessContext: Number of references imported from external databases.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of references imported from external databases.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Harici veritabanlarından içe aktarılan referans sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aus externen Datenbanken importierten Referenzen.

inputs.label: Auto-Generation Time per Reference
inputs.businessContext: Time to automatically generate a reference from a database.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time to automatically generate a reference from a database.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir veritabanından referansı otomatik olarak oluşturma süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit, eine Referenz automatisch aus einer Datenbank zu generieren.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
